title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Liases Foras - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Liases Foras - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
